prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 历史类 2021 年最低位次约 4525 名，2023 年约 4609 名，2025 年约 5034 名，整体呈后移趋势，近 3 年后移约 425 名；2025 年基准位次约 5034 名；该校在湖北省历史类招生计划 2021 年 10 人、2023 年 12 人、2025 年 5 人，2026 年计划 8 人，较 2025 年扩招 60%，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜 2025 年第 180 名，2026 年升至第 177 名，排名稳中有升；2026 年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及排球比赛中的观众争议事件，对报考心理有一定抑制作用；抖音热度为高热（总排名第 18），短视频曝光量大，关注度较高，正负效应交织；北京体育大学以体育学为核心特色，第五轮学科评估中体育学获评 A+（全国顶尖），与招生专业中的运动康复、体育经济与管理等高度关联，对体育类考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 体育相关专业社会热度平稳偏升；湖北省 2026 年普通高考考生总数约 393700 人，较 2025 年历史类（141436）+物理类（249802）=391238 人微增约 0.6%，竞争基本持平，历史类本科批 2021 年 463 分→2025 年 442 分，呈下降趋势，反映整体录取门槛略有降低；北京体育大学位于北京市，对湖北省考生而言属于跨省报考，地域偏好中性；该校在本省（北京）招生占比数据 缺失。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026 年计划大幅扩招（60%）、声誉偏负面与抖音高热并存、湖北省考生总数微增等因素，预测 2026 年历史类最低位次约 6816 名，区间 6316-7316 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: History Category: 2021 minimum rank approx. 4525, 2023 approx. 4609, 2025 approx. 5034, overall trend moving backward, with a backward shift of about 425 places in the last 3 years; 2025 baseline rank approx. 5034; enrollment plan for History Category in Hubei Province: 10 in 2021, 12 in 2023, 5 in 2025, and 8 in 2026, an increase of 60% compared to 2025, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science Main Ranking: 180th in 2025, rising to 177th in 2026, ranking steadily improving; 2026 reputation evaluation slightly negative, mainly related to audience controversy incidents in volleyball matches, which may somewhat suppress application psychology; Douyin popularity is high (overall rank 18), with large short video exposure and high attention, mixing positive and negative effects; Beijing Sport University has sports science as its core specialty, with Sports Science rated A+ (top in the country) in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, highly relevant to enrollment majors such as Sports Rehabilitation and Sports Economics & Management, strongly attracting sports-oriented candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of sports-related majors is stable to slightly rising; total number of regular college entrance exam candidates in Hubei Province in 2026 is about 393,700, a slight increase of about 0.6% compared to 2025 (History Category 141,436 + Physics Category 249,802 = 391,238), competition basically flat; History Category undergraduate batch score line: 463 in 2021 → 442 in 2025, showing a downward trend, reflecting a slight decrease in overall admission threshold; Beijing Sport University is located in Beijing, which is an inter-provincial application for Hubei candidates, with neutral regional preference; data on the proportion of enrollment in its own province (Beijing) is missing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings, the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (60%), the coexistence of negative reputation and high Douyin popularity, and the slight increase in the total number of candidates in Hubei Province, the predicted minimum rank for History Category in 2026 is about 6816, with a range of 6316-7316.
